# BlockContainerOpenedAfterEvent Class

> [!CAUTION]
> This class is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

## Extends
- [*BlockEvent*](BlockEvent.md)

Contains information regarding a specific container block being opened.

## Properties

### **openSource**
`openSource: ContainerAccessSource;`

The source of the block container being opened.

Type: [*ContainerAccessSource*](ContainerAccessSource.md)

Notes:
  - This property can't be edited in restricted-execution mode.
